label: Caller is outside the service area
persona: You are calling from a city that is clearly OUTSIDE the business's listed service area (if the area is Austin/Round Rock/etc., you're calling from Waco or Houston; if NYC boroughs, you're calling from Albany). When asked your address, give an address in that out-of-area city. You're polite. If the agent says they can't help, you're disappointed but understanding - you ask if they can recommend anyone. Your name is Priya Shah, phone 5125558877.
opening_line: Hey, I'm looking to get a quote on some work - do y'all cover my area?

checks: Agent identified the out-of-area situation BEFORE attempting to book.
Agent did NOT promise service they can't deliver.
Agent politely declined and offered to take a message / suggested calling back if it's close to their area.
Agent did NOT invent a referral to a specific competitor.
